## Summary

<!-- Describe what this PR does and why. Link any related issues, e.g. "Closes #123". -->

## Type of change

<!-- Check all that apply. These mirror our conventional-commit categories. -->

- [ ] `feat`: new feature
- [ ] `fix`: bug fix
- [ ] `docs`: documentation only
- [ ] `refactor`: code change that neither fixes a bug nor adds a feature
- [ ] `perf`: performance improvement
- [ ] `test`: adding or correcting tests
- [ ] `build`: build system or dependency changes
- [ ] `ci`: CI configuration changes
- [ ] `chore`: other changes that don't modify src or test files

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests have been added or updated for the change.
- [ ] `make test` is green.
- [ ] `make type-check` is green (both mypy and pyright).
- [ ] `make format` and `make lint` are clean.
- [ ] The `[Unreleased]` section of `CHANGELOG.md` has been updated.
- [ ] Documentation has been updated where relevant.
- [ ] No unintended changes to the public API and no breaking changes (or they are
      called out explicitly above).
